chatbot.welcome: [TRANSLATE] Welcome to Powerton Engineering! How can I help you today?

responses.products: [TRANSLATE] We offer a comprehensive range of industrial automation products, electrical components, instrumentation, solar systems, and more. What specific products are you looking for?
responses.services: [TRANSLATE] Our services include installation, maintenance, calibration, technical support, and custom solutions. Which service interests you?
responses.contact: [TRANSLATE] You can reach us at +91-94627-71662 or email us at info@powertonengineering.com. Our headquarters is located in Noida, India, and we serve clients worldwide.
responses.quote: [TRANSLATE] I'd be happy to help you get a quote! Please visit our quote page or provide me with your requirements.
responses.support: [TRANSLATE] Our technical support team is here to help! Please describe your technical question or issue.
